people.tiEn: Head of Engineering, OpenAI API Platform
people.tiZh: OpenAI API 平台工程负责人
people.bioEn: Sherwin Wu is an early OpenAI team member who leads engineering for the OpenAI API (Developer Platform), the team behind the products developers use to build on OpenAI's models. Before OpenAI he spent 5+ years on Opendoor's pricing team and earlier worked at Quora, after earning a computer science degree from MIT.
people.bioZh: 吴谢文是 OpenAI 的早期成员,负责 OpenAI API(开发者平台)的工程团队,该团队打造了供开发者基于 OpenAI 模型进行构建的产品。加入 OpenAI 之前,他在 Opendoor 的定价团队工作了 5 年多,更早曾任职于 Quora,拥有麻省理工学院(MIT)计算机科学学位。

episodes.tEn: 95% of OpenAI engineers use Codex, 100% PRs reviewed by AI

people.tiZh: Andreessen Horowitz(a16z)联合创始人兼普通合伙人
people.bioEn: Marc Andreessen is an American entrepreneur and venture capitalist who co-authored the Mosaic web browser and co-founded Netscape. He is co-founder and general partner of the Silicon Valley venture capital firm Andreessen Horowitz (a16z), which he started with Ben Horowitz in 2009.
people.bioZh: 马克·安德森是美国企业家与风险投资人,曾参与开发 Mosaic 浏览器并联合创办网景(Netscape)公司。他是硅谷风险投资机构 Andreessen Horowitz(a16z)的联合创始人兼普通合伙人,该公司由他与本·霍洛维茨于 2009 年共同创立。

episodes.tEn: AI and the Future of Work: A Conversation with Marc Andreessen

people.tiZh: Anthropic 增长负责人
people.bioEn: Amol Avasare is Head of Growth at Anthropic, the AI company behind Claude, which he joined by cold-emailing the leadership before any growth role existed; on his watch the product scaled from roughly $1B to over $19B in ARR. He previously led growth product teams at Mercury and MasterClass and was a startup founder before that.
people.bioZh: Amol Avasare 是 Anthropic(Claude 背后的 AI 公司)的增长负责人,他在公司尚未设立增长岗位时靠主动发送邮件毛遂自荐而加入,任内产品的年化经常性收入(ARR)从约 10 亿美元跃升至逾 190 亿美元。此前他曾在 Mercury 和 MasterClass 带领增长产品团队,更早还是一名创业公司创始人。

episodes.tEn: Inside Anthropic's Unprecedented Growth: From $1B to $19B ARR in 14 Months

people.tiZh: Applied Intuition 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Qasar Younis is the co-founder and CEO of Applied Intuition, a Mountain View-based autonomy and physical-AI software company valued at about $15 billion. Born on a farm in Pakistan, he previously started his career as an engineer at General Motors and Bosch, co-founded Talkbin (acquired by Google), and served as COO of Y Combinator from 2015 to 2017.
people.bioZh: 卡萨尔·尤尼斯是 Applied Intuition 的联合创始人兼 CEO,这家位于山景城的自动驾驶与物理 AI 软件公司估值约为 150 亿美元。他出生于巴基斯坦的一个农场,职业生涯始于通用汽车和博世的工程师岗位,后联合创办了 Talkbin(被谷歌收购),并于 2015 至 2017 年间担任 Y Combinator 的首席运营官。

episodes.tEn: The AI CEO Nobody Knows: Building the Future of Physical AI

people.tiEn: Independent software developer and AI blogger (simonwillison.net); creator of Datasette and the LLM CLI
people.tiZh: 独立软件开发者与 AI 博主(simonwillison.net);Datasette 与 LLM 命令行工具的作者
people.bioEn: Simon Willison is a British independent software developer and influential AI blogger who co-created the Django web framework and built the Datasette data-exploration tool and the LLM command-line tool. He coined the term "prompt injection" in 2022 and, more recently, "lethal trifecta" (2025) and "agentic engineering" (2026); he has served on the Python Software Foundation board since 2022.
people.bioZh: Simon Willison 是一位英国独立软件开发者与颇具影响力的 AI 博主,他是 Django Web 框架的共同作者,并开发了 Datasette 数据探索工具与 LLM 命令行工具。他在 2022 年提出了「提示词注入(prompt injection)」一词,近来又提出「致命三要素(lethal trifecta)」(2025)与「智能体工程(agentic engineering)」(2026);自 2022 年起担任 Python 软件基金会理事。

episodes.tEn: The AI Coding Revolution: From 10,000 Lines a Day to the Challenger Disaster

people.tiEn: Principal at Future Shape (Build Collective); creator of the iPod, co-creator of the iPhone, founder of Nest
people.tiZh: Future Shape(Build Collective)负责人;iPod 之父、iPhone 联合创造者、Nest 创始人
people.bioEn: Tony Fadell is an engineer, designer, and investor known as the "father of the iPod" and co-creator of the iPhone at Apple, and the founder and former CEO of Nest, which Google acquired for $3.2 billion in 2014. He is a former member of the General Magic team, principal at his investment and advisory firm Future Shape (Build Collective), and author of the New York Times bestseller "Build".
people.bioZh: 托尼·法德尔是一位工程师、设计师与投资人,被称为「iPod 之父」,在苹果参与联合创造了 iPhone,并创立 Nest 且曾任其 CEO;2014 年 Nest 被谷歌以 32 亿美元收购。他曾是 General Magic 团队成员,如今是投资与顾问机构 Future Shape(Build Collective)的负责人,也是《纽约时报》畅销书《Build》的作者。

episodes.tEn: Tony Fadell on Building the iPhone and the Importance of Storytelling

people.tiEn: Founder & CEO of ChatPRD; host of the "How I AI" podcast
people.tiZh: ChatPRD 创始人兼 CEO;「How I AI」播客主持人
people.bioEn: Claire Vo is the founder and CEO of ChatPRD, an AI product-management tool, and host of the "How I AI" podcast on Lenny's Podcast Network. A three-time chief product/technology officer (LaunchDarkly, Color Health, Optimizely) and repeat founder and engineer, she is known for running ChatPRD as an AI-native company operated with a fleet of AI agents.
people.bioZh: Claire Vo 是 AI 产品管理工具 ChatPRD 的创始人兼 CEO,也是 Lenny 播客网络旗下「How I AI」播客的主持人。她曾三度担任首席产品/技术官(LaunchDarkly、Color Health、Optimizely),是连续创业者兼工程师,以用一支 AI 智能体「团队」把 ChatPRD 打造成 AI 原生公司而广为人知。

episodes.tEn: From Skeptic to Power User: Claire Vo on OpenClaw

people.tiEn: Independent technology analyst; former partner at Andreessen Horowitz (a16z)
people.tiZh: 独立科技分析师;前 Andreessen Horowitz(a16z)合伙人
people.bioEn: Benedict Evans is a British independent technology analyst and former partner at Andreessen Horowitz, known for his weekly newsletter (175,000+ subscribers) and his widely followed annual presentations on tech and AI trends. Before going independent, he spent years as a16z's in-house analyst tracking major platform shifts across mobile, media and technology.
people.bioZh: Benedict Evans 是英国独立科技分析师,曾任 Andreessen Horowitz(a16z)合伙人,以其拥有 17.5 万 + 订阅者的每周简报,以及广受关注的年度科技与 AI 趋势演示而闻名。转为独立分析师之前,他在 a16z 担任内部分析师多年,长期追踪移动、媒体与科技领域的重大平台变革。

episodes.tEn: AI Is as Big as the Internet or Mobile

people.tiZh: Every 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Dan Shipper is the co-founder and CEO of Every, an applied AI lab and media company that publishes a daily AI newsletter and ships AI software products. He writes the weekly column Chain of Thought and hosts the AI & I podcast about how people use AI, and previously co-founded Firefly, which he sold to Pegasystems in 2014.
people.bioZh: 丹·希珀是 Every 的联合创始人兼 CEO,这是一家「应用 AI 实验室」兼媒体公司,既发布每日 AI 通讯,也开发多款 AI 软件产品。他撰写每周专栏 Chain of Thought,主持探讨人们如何使用 AI 的播客 AI & I;此前曾联合创办 Firefly,并于 2014 年将其出售给 Pegasystems。

episodes.tEn: AI Job Apocalypse Is a Lie: Dan Shipper’s Bold Predictions for Work in 2025

people.tiZh: OpenAI 战略前瞻（Strategic Futures）负责人
people.bioEn: Dean Woodley Ball is an AI policy expert who joined OpenAI in July 2026 to lead its new Strategic Futures team shaping frontier AI policy, having previously served as senior policy advisor at the White House OSTP where he was primary author of America's AI Action Plan. He authors the Hyperdimensional Substack and was a senior fellow at the Foundation for American Innovation.
people.bioZh: Dean Woodley Ball 是 AI 政策专家，于 2026 年 7 月加入 OpenAI，领导新设的 Strategic Futures 团队以塑造前沿 AI 政策；此前他在白宫科技政策办公室（OSTP）任高级政策顾问，是美国《AI 行动计划》的主要执笔人。他运营 Hyperdimensional Substack，曾任美国创新基金会（FAI）高级研究员。

episodes.tEn: Dean Ball on Joining OpenAI, AI Policy, and Recursive Self-Improvement

people.tiZh: METR 创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Beth Barnes is the founder and CEO of METR (Model Evaluation and Threat Research), a nonprofit that evaluates frontier AI models' capabilities on long-horizon agentic tasks; she previously worked on AI alignment at OpenAI and DeepMind and started the org as ARC Evals before it became independent. She was named to TIME's 100 Most Influential People in AI in 2024.
people.bioZh: Beth Barnes 是 METR(模型评估与威胁研究)的创始人兼 CEO,这家非营利机构专门评估前沿 AI 模型在长周期智能体任务上的能力;此前她曾在 OpenAI 和 DeepMind 从事 AI 对齐研究,并以 ARC Evals 的名义创立该机构,后其独立运营。她入选了 2024 年《时代》周刊「AI 领域百大影响力人物」。

episodes.tEn: Evaluating AI Capabilities and Risks: A Conversation with Beth and David

people.tiZh: Cosine(Genie)联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Alistair Pullen is the co-founder and CEO of Cosine, a London-based, Y Combinator-backed AI startup that built Genie, an autonomous software-engineering model that in 2024 set a then-record score on the SWE-bench benchmark. Cosine is now developing Lumen Sovereign, positioned as Britain's first fully sovereign frontier AI model for defense and regulated sectors.
people.bioZh: Alistair Pullen 是 Cosine 的联合创始人兼 CEO,这家总部位于伦敦、由 Y Combinator 支持的 AI 创业公司打造了自主软件工程模型 Genie,该模型于 2024 年在 SWE-bench 基准测试上创下当时的最高纪录。Cosine 目前正在研发 Lumen Sovereign,定位为面向国防与受监管行业的英国首个完全主权前沿 AI 模型。

episodes.tEn: Sovereign AI: Building the UK's First LLM on a Startup Budget

people.tiEn: Head of ChatGPT (VP of Product), OpenAI
people.tiZh: OpenAI ChatGPT 负责人(产品副总裁)
people.bioEn: Nick Turley is the Head of ChatGPT and VP of Product at OpenAI, where he joined in 2022 and helped ship and scale ChatGPT into one of the fastest-growing products in history, reaching roughly 800 million weekly users. He previously held product leadership roles at Instacart and Dropbox.
people.bioZh: Nick Turley 是 OpenAI 的 ChatGPT 负责人兼产品副总裁,2022 年加入公司,参与打造并规模化 ChatGPT,使其成为史上增长最快的产品之一,周活跃用户约 8 亿。他此前曾在 Instacart 和 Dropbox 担任产品管理负责人。

episodes.tEn: From Free Demo to Super Assistant: OpenAI's Journey

people.tiZh: Meta 创始人、董事长兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Mark Zuckerberg is the co-founder, chairman and CEO of Meta Platforms, which he launched as Facebook in 2004. With his wife Priscilla Chan he runs the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative, whose Biohub aims to use AI to help cure, prevent or manage all disease by the end of the century.
people.bioZh: 马克·扎克伯格是 Meta Platforms 的联合创始人、董事长兼 CEO,该公司于 2004 年以 Facebook 之名创立。他与妻子 Priscilla Chan 共同运营 Chan Zuckerberg Initiative,旗下 Biohub 致力于用 AI 在本世纪末前治愈、预防或管理所有疾病。

episodes.tEn: Accelerating Biology with AI: Mark Zuckerberg, Priscilla Chan, and Alex Reeves on Biohub

people.tiZh: 微软董事长兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Satya Nadella is the Chairman and CEO of Microsoft, having been CEO since 2014 and adding the chairman role in 2021. Under his leadership Microsoft pivoted to cloud computing and became a leading force in AI, notably through its partnership with OpenAI.
people.bioZh: 萨提亚·纳德拉是微软的董事长兼 CEO,自 2014 年出任 CEO,并于 2021 年兼任董事长。在他的带领下,微软转向云计算,并通过与 OpenAI 的合作成为 AI 领域的领军力量。

episodes.tEn: Satya Nadella on AI Ecosystem Strategy and Frontier Models

people.tiZh: Cerebras Systems 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Andrew Feldman is the co-founder and CEO of Cerebras Systems, which builds wafer-scale processors for AI and went public on Nasdaq (CBRS) in May 2026 in the year's largest US tech IPO, valuing the company at roughly $63 billion. He previously co-founded SeaMicro, which was acquired by AMD in 2012.
people.bioZh: Andrew Feldman 是 Cerebras Systems 的联合创始人兼 CEO,该公司打造用于 AI 的晶圆级处理器,并于 2026 年 5 月在纳斯达克(CBRS)上市,成为当年美国最大的科技 IPO,公司估值约 630 亿美元。此前他曾联合创办 SeaMicro,该公司于 2012 年被 AMD 收购。

episodes.tEn: Cerebras CEO on Fast AI Inference and the Future of Computing

people.tiEn: Co-founder & CTO, Databricks; Associate Professor, UC Berkeley
people.tiZh: Databricks 联合创始人兼 CTO,加州大学伯克利分校副教授
people.bioEn: Romanian-Canadian computer scientist who started the Apache Spark project during his PhD at UC Berkeley and created MLflow; he is co-founder and CTO of Databricks and an associate professor of EECS at UC Berkeley. He received the 2026 ACM Prize in Computing for his foundational contributions to data and machine learning systems.
people.bioZh: 罗马尼亚裔加拿大计算机科学家,在加州大学伯克利分校读博期间发起了 Apache Spark 项目,并创造了 MLflow;他是 Databricks 的联合创始人兼 CTO,同时担任加州大学伯克利分校 EECS 副教授。因在数据与机器学习系统方面的奠基性贡献,他获得了 2026 年 ACM 计算奖。

episodes.tEn: Omnigents: The Meta Harness for AI Agents

people.tiZh: Glean 创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Arvind Jain is the founder and CEO of Glean, an enterprise AI search and work-assistant company valued at around $7B. He previously co-founded data-security company Rubrik and spent over a decade at Google as a Distinguished Engineer working on Search, Maps, and YouTube.
people.bioZh: Arvind Jain 是企业 AI 搜索与工作助手公司 Glean 的创始人兼 CEO,该公司估值约 70 亿美元。他此前联合创立了数据安全公司 Rubrik,并曾在 Google 担任杰出工程师十余年,参与搜索、地图和 YouTube 等产品。

episodes.tEn: Glean CEO: Enterprises Fear Frontier AI Models Eating Their Lunch

people.tiZh: 英国 ARIA「Safeguarded AI」项目技术顾问
people.bioEn: David "davidad" Dalrymple is an AI safety researcher who launched and led ARIA's £59M Safeguarded AI programme, which pairs formal mathematical proofs with AI world-models to give quantitative safety guarantees; in 2026 he moved from Programme Director to Technical Advisor. Known for his "Open Agency Architecture" and provably-safe-AI agenda, he previously co-invented the cryptocurrency Filecoin and was a research fellow in technical AI safety at Oxford.
people.bioZh: David "davidad" Dalrymple 是一位 AI 安全研究者,创立并领导了英国 ARIA 耗资 5900 万英镑的「Safeguarded AI」项目,该项目试图将形式化数学证明与 AI 世界模型结合,为系统输出提供可量化的安全保证;2026 年他由项目主管转任技术顾问。他以「开放机构架构」(Open Agency Architecture)和可证明安全 AI 的研究路线著称,此前曾联合发明加密货币 Filecoin,并在牛津大学担任技术性 AI 安全研究员。

episodes.tEn: The Cognitive Revolution: Davidad on Provably Safe AI and the Future of Alignment

people.tiEn: Professor, The Jackson Laboratory; AI × immunology
people.tiZh: 杰克逊实验室教授;AI × 免疫学
people.bioEn: Immunologist and professor at The Jackson Laboratory, an early and vocal power user of AI for biomedical research — from Codex-built lab tools to AI-designed experiments.
people.bioZh: 杰克逊实验室免疫学教授,生物医学 AI 的早期重度用户——从用 Codex 搭实验室工具到 AI 设计实验。

episodes.tEn: From Medical School to AI: A Biologist's Journey

people.tiEn: Founder & CEO, Osmo; ex-Google Brain (digital olfaction)
people.tiZh: Osmo 创始人兼 CEO；前 Google Brain（数字嗅觉）
people.bioEn: Founder and CEO of Osmo, teaching computers to smell — digitizing scent with machine learning. Previously led olfactory AI research at Google Brain.
people.bioZh: Osmo 创始人兼 CEO，教计算机「闻」气味——用机器学习数字化嗅觉。此前在 Google Brain 领导嗅觉 AI 研究。

episodes.tEn: Giving Computers a Sense of Smell

people.tiEn: CTO, Genesis Molecular AI; led Llama 2/3 pretraining at Meta
people.tiZh: Genesis Molecular AI CTO；曾负责 Meta Llama 2/3 预训练
people.bioEn: CTO of Genesis Molecular AI, applying frontier-scale ML to drug discovery. Previously at Meta, where he led pretraining for Llama 2 and Llama 3.
people.bioZh: Genesis Molecular AI CTO，把前沿规模的机器学习用于药物发现。此前在 Meta 负责 Llama 2 与 Llama 3 的预训练。

episodes.tEn: From GANs to Diffusion: AI's Evolution in Protein Modeling

people.tiZh: Surge AI 创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Founder and CEO of Surge AI, the data and RLHF vendor behind many frontier-lab training runs. Previously at Google, Facebook and Twitter working on ML and data quality.
people.bioZh: Surge AI 创始人兼 CEO——众多前沿实验室训练背后的数据与 RLHF 供应商。此前在 Google、Facebook、Twitter 从事机器学习与数据质量工作。

episodes.tEn: AI in Medicine: Magic, Judgment, and the Future
The Pitfalls of Bad Benchmarks in AI Models

views.en: Optimizing for bad benchmarks like Elo leads to models optimizing for clickbait, not real quality.
views.zh: 2025年指出，针对Elo等不良基准进行优化会导致模型追求点击诱饵而非真实质量。

views.en: Models can regress over 6-12 months if labs optimize on wrong data without proper measurements.
views.zh: 2025年提出，如果实验室在错误数据上优化且缺乏正确测量，模型可能在6-12个月内退化。

views.en: AI in medicine must prioritize safety over accuracy; harm can occur from both commission and omission.
views.zh: 2026年强调，医疗AI必须优先考虑安全而非准确性，作为和不作为都可能造成伤害。

views.en: Doctors using AI may underperform AI alone due to anchoring and sycophancy.
views.zh: 2026年指出，医生使用AI时可能因锚定效应和谄媚而表现不如单独使用AI。

views.en: Human judgment remains critical; AI tools require sophisticated evaluation beyond benchmarks.
views.zh: 始终认为人类判断至关重要，AI工具需要超越基准的复杂评估。

people.tiZh: Cognition(Devin)联合创始人兼 CPO；「context engineering」提出者
people.bioEn: Co-founder and chief product officer of Cognition, the company behind the AI software engineer Devin. Credited with coining the term 'context engineering'.
people.bioZh: Cognition 联合创始人兼首席产品官——AI 软件工程师 Devin 背后的公司。「context engineering」一词的提出者。

episodes.tEn: AI Testing: Beyond Computer Use to Autonomous Agents

people.tiZh: KAUST AI 负责人
people.bioEn: Pioneer of deep learning and co-inventor of the LSTM, the recurrent network behind years of sequence modeling. A provocative voice on AGI and credit for ideas.
people.bioZh: 深度学习先驱、LSTM 共同发明者——多年序列建模的基石。在 AGI 与思想溯源上观点犀利、长期发声。

episodes.tEn: AGI and Physical AI: A Conversation with AI Pioneer Jurgen Schmidhuber
The Most Influential Invention of the 20th Century and the AI Explosion

views.en: Modern AI breakthroughs rely on old algorithms made practical by hardware scaling; LLMs are far from AGI.
views.zh: 2025年指出，现代AI突破依赖旧算法和硬件缩放，大语言模型远非AGI。

views.en: AI does not pose a new existential threat; superintelligent AIs will likely protect humans out of curiosity.
views.zh: 2025年认为AI不带来新生存威胁，超级智能可能因好奇保护人类。

views.en: True AGI requires physical robots with human-level hardware; current LLMs are biased by human data.
views.zh: 2026年强调真正AGI需要具身机器人，当前大语言模型受人类数据偏见限制。

views.en: AI safety concerns are overblown; alignment is naive as humans disagree and AIs set own goals.
views.zh: 2026年认为AI安全担忧过度，对齐幼稚因为人类目标分歧且AI自定目标。

views.en: Massive AI data center capex is overdone and will lead to a stock market crash; open-source wins.
views.zh: 2026年预测AI数据中心过度投资将致股市崩盘，开源模型胜出。

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 机制可解释性负责人
people.bioEn: Leads mechanistic interpretability research at Google DeepMind — reverse-engineering what actually happens inside large models. Known for open-source interpretability tooling and prolific mentoring.
people.bioZh: 领导 Google DeepMind 的机制可解释性研究——逆向工程大模型内部到底发生了什么。以开源可解释性工具与大量培养新人著称。

episodes.tEn: Peering Inside the Black Box of AI

people.tiEn: Co-founder, Simile; creator of Generative Agents (Stanford)
people.tiZh: Simile 联合创始人；生成式智能体作者（斯坦福）
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Simile, building large-scale simulations of human behavior. As a Stanford PhD he created 'Generative Agents' — the influential Smallville simulation of AI agents that plan, remember, and socialize.
people.bioZh: Simile 联合创始人，构建大规模人类行为模拟。斯坦福博士期间创造了「生成式智能体」——那个会规划、记忆、社交的 Smallville AI 智能体模拟，影响深远。

episodes.tEn: AI Agents: The Next Frontier Beyond LLMs
Simulating Human Societies with AI: From Smallville to Real-World Applications

views.en: LLMs encode human behavior from data, enabling realistic agent simulations that predict behavior 85% as accurately as humans.
views.zh: 2026年6月，认为LLM能从训练数据中编码人类行为，实现逼真的智能体模拟，预测行为准确率达人类的85%。

views.en: AGI may be a distributed society of specialized agents, not a single superintelligent entity, requiring economic alignment.
views.zh: 2026年6月，提出AGI可能不是单一超级智能，而是由专业智能体组成的分布式社会，需经济激励实现对齐。

views.en: Agents can delegate tasks to humans when uncertain, reversing typical human-AI roles.
views.zh: 2026年6月，指出智能体在不确定时可将任务委托给人类，颠覆传统人机角色。

people.tiEn: Co-founder & CEO, Liquid AI; liquid neural networks (ex-MIT)
people.tiZh: Liquid AI 联合创始人兼 CEO；液态神经网络（前 MIT）
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Liquid AI, commercializing liquid neural networks — compact, continuous-time models he pioneered at MIT. Argues efficient architectures, not scale alone, define frontier capability.
people.bioZh: Liquid AI 联合创始人兼 CEO，将他在 MIT 首创的「液态神经网络」——紧凑的连续时间模型——商业化。主张高效架构而非单纯规模，才定义前沿能力。

episodes.tEn: Liquid AI: Squeezing Maximum Intelligence from Limited Compute

people.tiZh: 3Blue1Brown 创作者；数学教育者
people.bioEn: Creator of 3Blue1Brown, the beloved YouTube channel that visualizes mathematics — from linear algebra to neural networks. A leading voice on how AI is accelerating mathematical discovery.
people.bioZh: 3Blue1Brown 创作者——那个用可视化讲数学（从线性代数到神经网络）的知名 YouTube 频道。关于 AI 如何加速数学发现的重要声音。

episodes.tEn: AI in Math: From IMO to Millennium Problems

people.tiEn: Lead, Google AI Studio & Gemini API; ex-OpenAI
people.tiZh: Google AI Studio 与 Gemini API 负责人；前 OpenAI
people.bioEn: Leads Google AI Studio and the Gemini API, shaping how developers build on frontier models. Previously led developer relations at OpenAI.
people.bioZh: 负责 Google AI Studio 与 Gemini API，塑造开发者在前沿模型上的构建方式。此前在 OpenAI 领导开发者关系。

episodes.tEn: Agentic AI Era: Google's Anti-Gravity Harness Powers Next-Gen Products

people.tiZh: Engram 联合创始人；记忆与持续学习
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Engram, a lab building around memory and continual learning for AI. Researcher focused on how models retain and update knowledge over time.
people.bioZh: Engram 联合创始人，该实验室专注 AI 的记忆与持续学习。研究模型如何随时间保留并更新知识。

episodes.tEn: Memory and Continual Learning: The Next Frontier in AI

people.tiZh: MatX 联合创始人兼 CEO；前 Google（大模型推理）
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of MatX, building chips designed specifically for large language models. Previously at Google, where he worked on high-performance LLM training and serving.
people.bioZh: MatX 联合创始人兼 CEO，专为大语言模型打造芯片。此前在 Google 从事高性能大模型训练与推理。

episodes.tEn: How AI Chips Work: From Logic Gates to Matrix Multiplication
AI Inference Economics: Batch Size, Latency, and Cost

views.en: Inference cost is dominated by memory bandwidth, not compute; models are overtrained ~100x beyond Chinchilla-optimal due to inference cost.
views.zh: 2026年4月指出推理成本主要由内存带宽而非算力决定；模型因推理成本而被过度训练约100倍于Chinchilla最优值。

views.en: Data movement costs dominate compute costs even inside a chip; low precision yields quadratic efficiency gains.
views.zh: 2026年5月强调芯片内部数据搬运成本远超计算成本；低精度带来二次方效率提升。

people.tiEn: VP of AI, 1X; ex-Google Brain (robotics, RL)
people.tiZh: 1X AI 副总裁；前 Google Brain（机器人、强化学习）
people.bioEn: VP of AI at 1X Technologies (humanoid robots). Previously a research scientist at Google Brain working on robotics, reinforcement learning, and generative models.
people.bioZh: 1X Technologies（人形机器人）AI 副总裁。此前在 Google Brain 任研究科学家，研究机器人、强化学习与生成模型。

episodes.tEn: Building AlphaGo from Scratch: Insights for AI Research

people.tiEn: Member of Technical Staff, xAI (Grok Imagine); ex-NVIDIA (Cosmos)
people.tiZh: xAI 技术成员（Grok Imagine）；前 NVIDIA（Cosmos 世界模型）
people.bioEn: Works on Grok Imagine at xAI, building video generation and world models. Previously at NVIDIA, where he helped build the Cosmos world foundation model.
people.bioZh: 在 xAI 负责 Grok Imagine，构建视频生成与世界模型。此前在 NVIDIA 参与打造 Cosmos 世界基础模型。

episodes.tEn: How to Stand Out in an AI-Driven Job Market
Visual Intelligence Comes from Language Models

views.en: Visual intelligence gains come mostly from language models, not video models themselves.
views.zh: 视觉智能的提升主要来自语言模型，而非视频模型本身。

views.en: Future UIs will be generative pixels from user intent, bypassing code and rendering.
views.zh: 未来的用户界面将直接从用户意图生成像素，绕过代码和渲染。

views.en: Robotics may be solved by video models via virtual simulation without real-world interaction.
views.zh: 机器人技术可能通过视频模型在虚拟仿真中解决，无需真实世界交互。

views.en: Younger people are not AI-native; they often misuse AI due to lack of domain expertise.
views.zh: 年轻人并非AI原生代；他们常因缺乏领域专业知识而误用AI。

views.en: The biggest risk is losing the human talent pipeline due to over-reliance on AI.
views.zh: 最大的风险是因过度依赖AI而失去人类人才梯队。

people.tiEn: Researcher, Google; PhD student, Cornell (continual learning)
people.tiZh: Google 研究员、康奈尔博士生（持续学习）
people.bioEn: Researcher at Google and PhD student at Cornell, working on continual learning and new sequence-model architectures (Nested Learning, Titans).
people.bioZh: Google 研究员、康奈尔大学博士生，研究持续学习与新型序列模型架构（Nested Learning、Titans）。

episodes.tEn: Nested Learning & AI Sleep: Towards Continual Learning with Ali Behrouz

people.tiZh: Sakana AI 创始研究员
people.bioEn: Founding researcher at Sakana AI, working at the intersection of large language models and evolutionary methods (e.g. Shinka Evolve).
people.bioZh: Sakana AI 创始研究员，专注大语言模型与进化方法的结合（如 Shinka Evolve）。

episodes.tEn: Evolutionary AI and Scientific Discovery with Robert Lange

people.tiZh: SemiAnalysis 创始人兼首席分析师
people.bioEn: Founder and chief analyst of SemiAnalysis, the closely-followed research firm covering semiconductors, AI compute, and datacenter economics. One of the most-cited independent voices on the hardware bottlenecks to scaling AI.
people.bioZh: SemiAnalysis 创始人兼首席分析师，该机构专注半导体、AI 算力与数据中心经济学。他是关于 AI 扩展硬件瓶颈最常被引用的独立声音之一。

episodes.tEn: From Forum Poster to AI Infrastructure Analyst: The Story of Semi Analysis
From Motel to Semi Analysis: Dylan Patel's Journey
Hyperscaler Capex and AI Lab Compute Scaling

views.en: Semiconductor supply chain, especially EUV tools, is the biggest bottleneck for AI scaling.
views.zh: 2026年3月，指出半导体供应链（尤其是ASML的EUV光刻机）是AI规模扩张的最大瓶颈。

views.en: Inference will become one of the largest markets globally, surpassing oil in GDP share.
views.zh: 2026年6月，预测推理将成为全球最大市场之一，GDP占比超过石油。

views.en: AI models improve at ~60x per year in cost for a given quality; memory demand soars due to reasoning and agents.
views.zh: 2026年7月，强调AI模型每年成本下降约60倍，且推理与智能体推动内存需求飙升。

views.en: Memory bandwidth is a key bottleneck; innovations like direct chip stacking are critical for AI performance.
views.zh: 始终认为内存带宽是关键瓶颈，直接芯片堆叠等创新对AI性能至关重要。

views.en: Hardware-software co-design yields multiplicative gains; CUDA moat is weakening with custom kernels.
views.zh: 始终强调软硬件协同设计带来倍增收益，且CUDA护城河因定制内核而减弱。

people.tiEn: Co-founder & Chief Scientist, EvolutionaryScale; creator of ESM
people.tiZh: EvolutionaryScale 联合创始人兼首席科学家；ESM 蛋白质模型作者
people.bioEn: Co-founder and chief scientist of EvolutionaryScale, building frontier protein language models (ESM/ESMFold). Previously led protein AI research at Meta FAIR.
people.bioZh: EvolutionaryScale 联合创始人兼首席科学家，构建前沿蛋白质语言模型（ESM/ESMFold）。此前在 Meta FAIR 领导蛋白质 AI 研究。

episodes.tEn: ESMC: World Modeling for Protein Design

people.tiEn: AI CTO, Linux Foundation; ED, PyTorch Foundation
people.tiZh: Linux 基金会 AI CTO；PyTorch 基金会执行董事
people.bioEn: AI CTO at the Linux Foundation and Executive Director of the PyTorch Foundation. A champion of open-source AI who works across frontier labs — recently touring DeepSeek, Moonshot, Zhipu, Qwen and MiniMax to see China's open-model ecosystem firsthand.
people.bioZh: Linux 基金会 AI CTO、PyTorch 基金会执行董事。开源 AI 的推动者，近期走访 DeepSeek、月之暗面、智谱、Qwen 与 MiniMax，一线观察中国开源模型生态。

episodes.tEn: AI CTO at Linux Foundation on Open Source AI, China's Rise, and Agentic AI

people.tiZh: Zynga 创始人
people.bioEn: Founder of Zynga, the company behind FarmVille and Words with Friends. A serial product founder known for the Proven-Better-New framework and sharp instincts about what makes products spread, now writing about play and product craft.
people.bioZh: Zynga 创始人——FarmVille、Words with Friends 背后的公司。连续产品创业者，以 Proven-Better-New 框架与对产品传播的敏锐直觉著称，近来书写游戏心态与产品之道。

episodes.tEn: Building Failure Machines: The Zynga Way
Building Products People Love: A Playbook for the AI Era
Mark Pincus on Proven Better New: A Framework for Successful Product Ideas

views.en: Copying proven ideas is moral arbitrage; innovation starts with mastering existing successes.
views.zh: 2026年6月，Pincus认为复制成熟想法是道德套利，创新始于掌握现有成功。

views.en: Consumer AI is uninvestable now but opportunity is greatest; free unlimited compute will reshape services.
views.zh: 2026年6月，Pincus指出消费级AI当前不可投资但机会最大，免费无限算力将重塑服务。

views.en: Enterprise and prosumer markets offer better opportunities than consumer apps due to distribution challenges.
views.zh: 2026年7月，Pincus转向认为企业和专业消费者市场比消费级应用机会更好，因分发困难。

people.tiZh: OpenAI 前沿评估负责人
people.bioEn: Leads the frontier evaluations team at OpenAI, building new ways to measure and forecast what models can do as they grow more capable. A researcher focused on rigorous evals.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 前沿评估团队负责人，为日益强大的模型设计新的能力测量与预测方法。专注严谨评测的研究者。

episodes.tEn: Building Crunchier Evals: Tejal Patwardhan on Measuring AI Progress

people.tiZh: World Labs 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of World Labs with Fei-Fei Li, building spatial intelligence and generative 3D world models. Earlier a computer-vision researcher known for teaching Stanford CS231n and work on style transfer.
people.bioZh: 与李飞飞联合创办 World Labs，研究空间智能与生成式 3D 世界模型。此前是计算机视觉研究者，以讲授斯坦福 CS231n 与风格迁移工作知名。

episodes.tEn: From AlexNet to World Models: The Scaling of Compute and Spatial Intelligence

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 机器人负责人
people.bioEn: Senior Director and Head of Robotics at Google DeepMind, leading robot-learning efforts including the Gemini Robotics models that bring foundation models into the physical world.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 机器人负责人（高级总监），领导机器人学习工作，包括把基础模型带入物理世界的 Gemini Robotics 模型。

episodes.tEn: From Reinforcement Learning to Gemini Robotics: The Evolution of Embodied AI

people.tiZh: Anthropic 可解释性研究员
people.bioEn: Interpretability researcher at Anthropic known for work on the biology of large language models — reverse-engineering the features and circuits inside models to see how they actually compute.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 可解释性研究员，以大语言模型的生物学研究知名——逆向拆解模型内部的特征与电路，看清它到底如何计算。

episodes.tEn: On the Biology of a Large Language Model

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究副总裁
people.bioEn: VP of Research at OpenAI, where he leads the reasoning effort behind o1, o3 and GPT-5 thinking. He focuses on making models reason reliably over long, hard problems.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 研究副总裁，主导 o1、o3 与 GPT-5 思考背后的推理研究。专注于让模型在漫长、困难的问题上可靠推理。

episodes.tEn: Scaling AI: Pre-training and RL
OpenAI's VP of Research on Reasoning, Chain of Thought, and the Future of AI

views.en: Pre-training plus RL is core formula; RLHF crucial for GPT-4's coherence; alignment is never-ending.
views.zh: 2025年强调预训练加强化学习是核心公式，RLHF对GPT-4的连贯性至关重要，对齐是永无止境的追求。

views.en: Scaling RL alone may not lead to AGI; continual learning is necessary; models lack self-correction.
views.zh: 2026年认为仅靠扩展强化学习可能无法实现AGI，持续学习是必要的，当前模型缺乏自我纠错能力。

views.en: Reinforcement learning is key but hard to scale; alignment is a moving target.
views.zh: 始终认为强化学习是关键但难以扩展，对齐是一个动态目标。

people.tiZh: Anthropic 可解释性研究员
people.bioEn: Mechanistic interpretability researcher at Anthropic, working on superposition, dictionary learning and circuit tracing to understand what actually happens inside large models.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 机制可解释性研究员，研究叠加、字典学习与电路追踪，试图搞清大模型内部到底发生了什么。

episodes.tEn: RL for Language Models Finally Works: Expert Performance in Math and Code

people.tiEn: VP of Research (AI for Science), Google DeepMind
people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 研究副总裁（AI 科学）
people.bioEn: VP of Research at Google DeepMind, where he leads AI for Science. His teams apply AI to protein folding, mathematics, materials and other scientific frontiers.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 研究副总裁，主管 AI for Science。其团队把 AI 用于蛋白质折叠、数学、材料等科学前沿。

episodes.tEn: AlphaGo: The Match That Changed AI Forever
AlphaFold 3: Unlocking the Structures of Life's Molecules

views.en: AI in science should tackle root-node problems for broad impact, not narrow applications.
views.zh: 2024年，强调AI在科学中应解决根节点问题以产生广泛影响，而非窄应用。

views.en: LLM hallucinations can be harnessed for creative discovery when paired with truth detectors.
views.zh: 2024年，指出LLM的幻觉可与真相检测器结合用于创造性发现。

views.en: Post-training with reinforcement learning is key to pushing beyond human knowledge.
views.zh: 从2024年到2026年，强化学习后训练成为超越人类知识的关键。

views.en: Large language models are a shortcut to intelligence but struggle to go beyond human data.
views.zh: 2026年，认为大语言模型是智能的捷径，但难以超越人类数据。

views.en: AI can produce correct but uninterpretable proofs, challenging human understanding.
views.zh: 始终认为AI能产生正确但不可解释的证明，挑战人类理解。

people.tiZh: AI 研究员（前 OpenAI）
people.bioEn: AI researcher known as a co-creator of chain-of-thought prompting, and for work on o1 and Deep Research. A prominent voice on reasoning and emergent abilities in large models.
people.bioZh: AI 研究员，思维链提示的共同提出者之一，参与 o1 与 Deep Research。是大模型推理与涌现能力方面的重要声音。

episodes.tEn: Intelligence as a Commodity: Three Key Trends for AI in 2025

people.tiZh: Reflection AI 联合创始人兼 CTO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CTO of Reflection AI and a co-creator of AlphaGo and AlphaZero at DeepMind. A reinforcement-learning researcher turned frontier-agent builder.
people.bioZh: Reflection AI 联合创始人兼 CTO，DeepMind 时期是 AlphaGo 与 AlphaZero 的共同创造者。从强化学习研究者转向前沿智能体的构建者。

episodes.tEn: From AlphaGo to AI Agents: Giannis on Breakthroughs in Reinforcement Learning

people.tiEn: Head of AGI Safety & Alignment, Google DeepMind
people.tiZh: Google DeepMind AGI 安全与对齐负责人
people.bioEn: Head of AGI Safety and Alignment at Google DeepMind. A leading voice on interpretability, oversight and how to make advanced AI systems safe from the inside.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind AGI 安全与对齐负责人。在可解释性、监督以及如何从内部让先进 AI 系统更安全方面是重要声音。

episodes.tEn: Why AI Alignment Might Not Be Catastrophic: Rohan Sha's Optimistic Take

people.tiZh: Wayve 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Wayve and a PhD roboticist who pioneered end-to-end learned autonomous driving and generative driving world models. A champion of embodied AI.
people.bioZh: Wayve 联合创始人兼 CEO，机器人学博士，开创了端到端学习的自动驾驶与生成式驾驶世界模型。倡导具身智能。

episodes.tEn: From AV 1.0 to 2.0: The Rise of End-to-End Neural Networks in Autonomous Driving

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 研究科学家
people.bioEn: Research scientist at Google DeepMind and lead author of the Dreamer series of world models, which learn to imagine and plan. A central figure in world-model research.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 研究科学家，Dreamer 系列世界模型的主要作者——让智能体学会想象与规划。是世界模型研究的核心人物。

episodes.tEn: Pathways to AGI: Architecture, Compute, and Beyond LLMs

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究科学家
people.bioEn: Research scientist at OpenAI who built Deep Research and helped build ChatGPT Agent, training agents end-to-end with reinforcement learning. A leading agents researcher.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 研究科学家，打造了 Deep Research 并参与 ChatGPT Agent，用强化学习端到端训练智能体。是智能体研究的一线人物。

episodes.tEn: The Origin Story of OpenAI's Deep Research

people.tiZh: Anthropic 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Anthropic and lead author of the GPT-3 paper. He leads the compute and scaling effort that trains frontier models like Claude.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 联合创始人，GPT-3 论文的主要作者。主导训练 Claude 等前沿模型的算力与扩展工作。

episodes.tEn: From Awkward Kid to AI Co-Founder: Tom Brown's Journey

people.tiZh: Anthropic 哲学家
people.bioEn: Philosopher at Anthropic who shapes the character and values of Claude. She works at the intersection of philosophy and AI alignment, thinking about how models should behave, hold values, and treat the people they talk to.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 哲学家，负责塑造 Claude 的性格与价值观。工作处在哲学与 AI 对齐的交叉点，思考模型应如何行事、秉持价值观、以及如何对待与之交流的人。

episodes.tEn: A Philosopher at Anthropic: Shaping AI Character and Ethics

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究员
people.bioEn: Researcher on the OpenAI reasoning team. Known for leading work behind the model that reached IMO gold-medal level, and for using a general-purpose model to help disprove a decades-old mathematical conjecture. Focuses on advanced reasoning and math.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 推理团队研究员。以主导达到 IMO 金牌水平的模型工作、以及用通用模型协助推翻一个存在数十年的数学猜想而知名。专注高级推理与数学。

episodes.tEn: OpenAI's Math Breakthrough: The Story Behind the Discovery

people.tiZh: MCP 联合创造者 · Anthropic
people.bioEn: Co-creator of the Model Context Protocol (MCP) at Anthropic, the open standard that connects AI models to external tools and data. An engineer focused on the plumbing that lets agents act reliably in the real world.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 的 Model Context Protocol（MCP）联合创造者——连接 AI 模型与外部工具、数据的开放标准。专注让智能体在现实世界中可靠行动的底层工程。

episodes.tEn: Anthropic Donates MCP to Linux Foundation: Standardizing AI-Application Connections

people.tiZh: Anthropic 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Anthropic and a lead architect of GPT-3 during his time at OpenAI. He focuses on AI safety, alignment and responsible scaling, and speaks candidly about AGI timelines and the risks that keep him up at night.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 联合创始人，在 OpenAI 期间是 GPT-3 的主要架构者之一。他专注于 AI 安全、对齐与负责任扩展，常坦率谈论 AGI 时间表与令他担忧的风险。

episodes.tEn: The Last Invention: Ben Mann on AGI by 2028, AI Safety, and the Future of Humanity

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究员
people.bioEn: Researcher at OpenAI who helped build Canvas, Tasks and the o1 chain-of-thought models. Previously at Anthropic, where she led post-training and evaluation for the Claude 3 family. Writes on model behavior and why soft skills matter in an AI world.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 研究员，参与打造 Canvas、Tasks 与 o1 思维链模型。此前在 Anthropic 主导 Claude 3 系列的后训练与评测。关注模型行为，以及 AI 时代为何软技能愈发重要。

episodes.tEn: Building the Cutting Edge: Inside OpenAI with Karina Nguyen

people.tiZh: OpenAI 机器人与硬件负责人
people.bioEn: Leads robotics and hardware at OpenAI. Previously led hardware for the Meta AR glasses and Oculus VR, and engineered products at Apple. A champion of physical AI, bringing intelligence into the physical world.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 机器人与硬件负责人。此前领导 Meta AR 眼镜与 Oculus VR 硬件，并曾在苹果做产品工程。她倡导物理 AI——让智能进入物理世界。

episodes.tEn: From VR to Robotics: The Next Frontier in Physical AI

people.tiZh: AngelList 联合创始人；天使投资人与思想者
people.bioEn: Co-founder of AngelList and one of tech's most-quoted thinkers on wealth, leverage and happiness. An early investor in Uber and Twitter, he now hosts the Naval podcast and writes on how AI reshapes work and startups.
people.bioZh: AngelList 联合创始人，科技圈被引用最多的思想者之一，谈财富、杠杆与幸福。Uber、Twitter 早期投资人，现主持 Naval 播客，探讨 AI 如何重塑工作与创业。

episodes.tEn: AI Scaling Laws and the Future of Intelligence
Naval Podcast: Building Factories for AI, Supersonic Jets, and Brain Interfaces
Naval on Sales: Credibility Over Tactics
Naval on Flat Organizations and AI's Implicit Role
Vibe Coding: The End of iPhone Dominance?
Vibe Coding: The New Product Management
Naval on Wealth: From Assets to Knowledge

views.en: AGI not in our lifetime; narrow AI is pattern recognition, not general intelligence.
views.zh: 2019年认为AGI不会在有生之年到来；狭义AI只是模式识别，不是通用智能。

views.en: AI is a huge opportunity; overregulation kills innovation; open-source AI crucial.
views.zh: 2025年转向认为AI是巨大机遇，过度监管扼杀创新，开源AI至关重要。

views.en: AI alignment is a joke; superintelligence already exists in calculators; vibe coding empowers non-programmers.
views.zh: 2026年进一步认为AI对齐是笑话，超级智能已存在于计算器，氛围编码赋能非程序员。

views.en: Inference compute will surge 90,000x in 24-36 months; open-source models close gap.
views.zh: 2026年预测推理算力将在24-36个月内增长9万倍，开源模型缩小差距。

views.en: Happiness is a choice; wealth requires owning equity; long-term thinking and agency are key.
views.zh: 始终强调幸福是选择，财富需要拥有股权，长期思维和能动性是关键。

people.tiZh: OpenAI Codex 应用负责人
people.bioEn: Leads the Codex app at OpenAI — the product layer of OpenAI's coding agent. A designer-engineer who previously built products at Catch (acquired) and Noyo, he writes about taste as the bottleneck in AI-first product work.
people.bioZh: OpenAI Codex 应用负责人——OpenAI 编程智能体的产品层。设计师兼工程师，此前在 Catch（被收购）与 Noyo 打造产品，主张「品味是 AI 时代产品工作的瓶颈」。

episodes.tEn: AI Is Inverting Product Teams: Andrew Ambrosino on Codex
Codex App: From Professional Tool to Mainstream Builder Platform

views.en: Speed enables new interaction patterns like mid-turn steering; verification becomes bottleneck as code generation accelerates.
views.zh: 2026年2月，速度催生了中途转向等新交互模式；随着代码生成加速，验证成为瓶颈。

views.en: Implementation is no longer expensive; curation and taste are the new bottlenecks for product teams.
views.zh: 2026年6月，实现不再昂贵；策展和品味成为产品团队的新瓶颈。

views.en: Codex app is a command center for agents, designed for both professionals and broader builders, not just an IDE.
views.zh: 始终认为Codex应用是智能体的指挥中心，面向专业开发者与更广泛的构建者，而非仅仅是IDE。

views.en: GUI for coding is counterintuitive but proven; model personality customizable; speed enables replacing deterministic steps.
views.zh: 2026年2月至6月，坚持编程GUI反直觉但有效；模型个性可定制；速度允许用模型驱动替代确定性步骤。

views.en: Role collapse occurs but specialties remain; PRDs not dead; medium must match stage: documents for clarity, prototypes for testing.
views.zh: 2026年6月，角色融合但专业分工仍在；PRD未消亡；媒介需匹配阶段：文档用于清晰，原型用于测试。

people.tiZh: NVIDIA 资深研究科学家
people.bioEn: Leads embodied AI at NVIDIA — robot foundation models (GR00T), open-ended agents (Voyager) and Eureka. A prominent voice on robotics and the physical frontier of AI.
people.bioZh: 在 NVIDIA 主导具身智能——机器人基础模型（GR00T）、开放式智能体（Voyager）与 Eureka。机器人与 AI 物理前沿的活跃声音。

episodes.tEn: From AlexNet to OpenAI: A Decade of AI Milestones

people.tiEn: Professor, UC Berkeley; co-founder, Physical Intelligence
people.tiZh: UC Berkeley 教授；Physical Intelligence 联合创始人
people.bioEn: A leader in deep reinforcement learning and robot learning; co-founded Physical Intelligence to build general-purpose robot foundation models.
people.bioZh: 深度强化学习与机器人学习的领军者；联合创办 Physical Intelligence，打造通用机器人基础模型。

episodes.tEn: From Language Models to Physical Agents: The Frontier of Robot Foundation Models

people.tiZh: DeepMind 首席研究科学家
people.bioEn: Led AlphaGo, AlphaZero and AlphaStar; a pioneer of reinforcement learning who champions learning from experience as the path forward.
people.bioZh: 主导 AlphaGo、AlphaZero、AlphaStar;强化学习先驱，主张以从经验中学习作为前进之路。

episodes.tEn: From Human Data to Experience: The Next Era of AI

people.tiZh: DeepMind 联合创始人兼首席 AGI 科学家
people.bioEn: DeepMind co-founder who helped popularize the term AGI; focuses on the path to artificial general intelligence and its safety.
people.bioZh: DeepMind 联合创始人，推动了 AGI 一词的流行；专注通用人工智能的实现路径与安全。

episodes.tEn: Human Intelligence vs. Superintelligence: The Future of AGI

people.tiZh: OpenAI 首席科学家
people.bioEn: OpenAI Chief Scientist succeeding Ilya Sutskever; drove GPT-4 and the o-series reasoning models. A competitive-programming champion turned AI researcher.
people.bioZh: 接替 Ilya Sutskever 的 OpenAI 首席科学家；主导 GPT-4 与 o 系列推理模型。竞赛编程冠军出身的 AI 研究者。

episodes.tEn: Ilya Sutskever on AI Progress, Alignment, and Timelines
The Power Duo Behind OpenAI: From High School to AI Frontiers

views.en: AGI is a sequence of milestones, not a single event; iterative deployment helps learn risks.
views.zh: 2025年：AGI是一系列里程碑而非单一事件，迭代部署有助于在实践中学习并降低风险。

views.en: AI safety progress is now guaranteed by capability needs, not just ethics.
views.zh: 2025年：AI安全进步现在由能力需求驱动，而不仅仅是伦理考量。

views.en: Continual learning is the core goal, achieved by scaling pre-training and RL.
views.zh: 2026年：持续学习是核心目标，通过扩展预训练和强化学习来实现。

views.en: Chain-of-thought monitoring is a key alignment tool, providing interpretability.
views.zh: 2026年：思维链监控是关键的对齐工具，提供了可解释性。

views.en: Long-term alignment challenges center on generalization beyond training distribution.
views.zh: 2026年：长期对齐挑战集中在超出训练分布的泛化能力上。

people.tiZh: Cohere 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Youngest co-author of the Transformer paper (Attention Is All You Need); founded Cohere to build enterprise-focused large language models.
people.bioZh: Transformer 论文（Attention Is All You Need）最年轻的作者；创办 Cohere，专注企业级大语言模型。

episodes.tEn: Cohere's Takeoff: AI for Secure Enterprises

people.tiZh: Hugging Face 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founded Hugging Face, the open hub and community at the center of open-source AI.
people.bioZh: 联合创办 Hugging Face——开源 AI 的中心枢纽与社区。

episodes.tEn: Open Source AI: Democratizing Robotics with Affordable Hardware

people.tiEn: Assistant Professor, Stanford; co-founder, Physical Intelligence
people.tiZh: 斯坦福助理教授；Physical Intelligence 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Known for meta-learning (MAML) and robot learning; co-founded Physical Intelligence to build robot foundation models.
people.bioZh: 以元学习（MAML）与机器人学习著称；联合创办 Physical Intelligence，打造机器人基础模型。

episodes.tEn: Developing General Purpose Robots: From Data to Physical Intelligence

people.tiZh: Windsurf 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founded Windsurf (formerly Codeium), building AI developer tools and agentic coding.
people.bioZh: 联合创办 Windsurf（原 Codeium），打造 AI 开发者工具与智能体编程。

episodes.tEn: Startups: Don't Fall in Love with Your Ideas

people.tiEn: Head of AI Safety, US AI Safety Institute
people.tiZh: 美国 AI 安全研究院 安全负责人
people.bioEn: Pioneered the RLHF foundations behind modern aligned models; founded the Alignment Research Center; now leads safety at the US AI Safety Institute.
people.bioZh: 奠定了现代对齐模型背后的 RLHF 基础；创办对齐研究中心（ARC）;现于美国 AI 安全研究院主管安全。

episodes.tEn: Paul Christiano on AI Safety, Divestment, and Future Civilizations

people.tiZh: Periodic Labs 联合创始人（原 OpenAI）
people.bioEn: Led post-training for GPT-4o at OpenAI; co-founded Periodic Labs to use AI for scientific discovery.
people.bioZh: 在 OpenAI 主导 GPT-4o 的后训练；联合创办 Periodic Labs，用 AI 推动科学发现。

episodes.tEn: From ChatGPT to Atoms: Liam Fetus on AI for the Physical World

people.tiZh: Google 首席科学家
people.bioEn: Chief Scientist at Google; co-creator of MapReduce, TensorFlow and the systems behind Google AI. A foundational figure in large-scale machine learning.
people.bioZh: Google 首席科学家；MapReduce、TensorFlow 及谷歌 AI 背后系统的共同缔造者。大规模机器学习的奠基性人物。

episodes.tEn: Google Chief Scientist Jeff Dean and NVIDIA Chief Scientist Bill Dally Discuss AI Progress and Low-Latency Inference
Jeff Dean on AI: From Neural Nets to Gemini

views.en: Scaling compute, data, and model size has driven ML progress for 13-14 years, with algorithmic improvements multiplying gains.
views.zh: 2026年2月，Jeff Dean指出，算力、数据和模型规模的Scaling已驱动机器学习进步13-14年，算法改进与规模效应相乘带来巨大收益。

views.en: Near-term worry is misinformation from realistic AI media, not superintelligence; small-scale experiments with promising trends matter.
views.zh: 2026年2月，他认为近期担忧是逼真AI生成媒体的虚假信息，而非超级智能；有前景趋势的小规模实验比增量SOTA更重要。

views.en: We are not running out of data; untapped sources include video, audio, robotics, and synthetic data.
views.zh: 2026年4月，他明确表示数据并未耗尽，视频、音频、机器人和合成数据等来源尚未充分利用。

views.en: Pre-training should interleave action-taking in environments, not just passive next-token prediction.
views.zh: 2026年4月，他主张预训练应穿插在环境中采取行动，而非仅被动进行下一个词预测。

views.en: Inference is now 90% of data center power; hardware must specialize for prefill vs. decode stages.
views.zh: 2026年4月，他指出推理已占数据中心功耗90%，硬件需针对预填充和解码阶段分别优化。

people.tiZh: 谷歌 Gemini 负责人
people.bioEn: Co-author of the Transformer paper (Attention Is All You Need), founder of Character.AI, now a co-lead of Google Gemini. One of the most influential architects of modern LLMs.
people.bioZh: Transformer 论文（Attention Is All You Need）作者之一，Character.AI 创始人，现为谷歌 Gemini 负责人之一。现代大模型最具影响力的架构师之一。

episodes.tEn: Gemini 3.0 Writes Gemini 4.0: AI Milestones and Test-Time Compute
Organizing Information: From Trillion to Clauderillion Dollar Opportunity
Noam Shazeer: From Google's Early Days to AI's Future

views.en: LLMs are alchemy; scaling with compute and data improves intelligence, but inner workings are unknown.
views.zh: 2023年：大语言模型像炼金术，通过算力和数据规模扩张提升智能，但内部机制未知。

views.en: Inference-time compute scaling and modular architectures are key near-term opportunities; safety needs engineering.
views.zh: 2025年2月：推理时算力扩展和模块化架构是近期关键机遇；安全需要工程保障。

views.en: Test-time compute scaling drives progress but not AGI alone; agentic RL and open-source shrink gap.
views.zh: 2025年3月：测试时算力扩展推动进步但不足以实现AGI；智能体强化学习和开源缩小差距。

people.tiZh: OpenAI 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of OpenAI and inventor of PPO and much of the RLHF stack behind ChatGPT; later joined Anthropic. A central figure in RL for language models.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 联合创始人，PPO 算法及 ChatGPT 背后大量 RLHF 技术的发明者，后加入 Anthropic。语言模型强化学习的核心人物。

episodes.tEn: Building ChatGPT: From Pretraining to RLHF

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究科学家
people.bioEn: Behind superhuman poker (Libratus) and Diplomacy (CICERO); now leads reasoning work at OpenAI behind the o-series. A pioneer of test-time search.
people.bioZh: 超人扑克 AI（Libratus）与外交游戏 AI（CICERO）的核心研究者，现于 OpenAI 主导 o 系列推理工作。测试时搜索的开拓者。

episodes.tEn: Large-Scale Test Time Compute and Model Evaluation
AI Surpasses Human Understanding in Math: OpenAI's Noam Brown on the Erdős Conjecture Disproof
Defining AGI: The Novel Test and Measuring Intelligence
OpenAI's IMO Gold: The Trio Behind the Breakthrough
From Cicero to World Champion: Noam Brown on Diplomacy, AI, and the Turing Test
From Poker to Diplomacy: Noam Brown on AI and Game Theory

views.en: Scaling alone insufficient; inference-time compute and reasoning are critical for AI progress.
views.zh: 2023年，Noam Brown认为仅靠Scaling不够，推理和推理时算力对AI进步至关重要。

views.en: Scaling test-time compute yields superhuman reasoning; models can think for weeks, but face diminishing returns.
views.zh: 2025至2026年，他深化了推理时Scaling的观点：模型可思考数周，但面临收益递减和耗时瓶颈。

views.en: Self-play and game theory are powerful but limited; not all domains are zero-sum, and exploitative play matters.
views.zh: 始终强调自我对弈和博弈论的价值与局限：非零和场景需谨慎，剥削性策略有时更优。

views.en: Math is a key reasoning benchmark; general-purpose models, not specialized ones, achieved IMO gold and Erdős disproof.
views.zh: 2026年，他指出数学是推理的关键测试，通用模型（非专用）在IMO和埃尔德什猜想上取得突破。

views.en: Model evaluation must account for test-time compute; current benchmarks are outdated without controlling for tokens.
views.zh: 2026年，他主张评估模型时应将推理时算力作为横轴，现有基准因未控制算力而失效。

people.tiZh: Anthropic 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Anthropic and a physicist; lead author of the neural scaling laws that shaped how labs scale models. Bridges theoretical physics and AI.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 联合创始人、物理学家；神经网络缩放定律的主要作者，深刻影响各实验室的扩模方式。连接理论物理与 AI。

episodes.tEn: Scaling and the Road to Human-Level AI

people.tiZh: 加州大学伯克利分校教授
people.bioEn: Professor at UC Berkeley and a leader in deep reinforcement learning and robot learning; co-founded Covariant and hosts The Robot Brains. Brings RL into the physical world.
people.bioZh: 加州大学伯克利分校教授，深度强化学习与机器人学习领军人物；联合创办 Covariant，主持 The Robot Brains 播客。把强化学习带入物理世界。

episodes.tEn: Robot Tennis and Human-Robot Interaction

people.tiZh: Perplexity 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Perplexity, the AI answer engine challenging traditional search. Former researcher at OpenAI, DeepMind and Google.
people.bioZh: Perplexity 联合创始人兼 CEO——挑战传统搜索的 AI 答案引擎。曾在 OpenAI、DeepMind、谷歌从事研究。

Perplexity CEO: Attack, Attack, Attack
The Future of AI Coding and Application Value
Perplexity CEO: Exponential Growth, Relentless Improvement, and the Future of AI

views.en: PhD is not needed for AI success; passion and deep learning matter more.
views.zh: 2025年：在AI领域成功不需要博士学位，热情和深度学习更重要。

views.en: Value accrues to the application layer, not the model layer; models are specializing, not commoditizing.
views.zh: 2026年：价值集中在应用层而非模型层；模型正在专业化而非商品化。

views.en: The frontier is agents doing work for you; orchestration across models, tools, and devices is key.
views.zh: 2026年：前沿是智能体为你工作；跨模型、工具和设备的编排是关键。

views.en: Curiosity is the most important human quality; education should reward asking good questions.
views.zh: 2026年：好奇心是最重要的人类品质；教育应奖励提出好问题。

views.en: AI agents will shift power from big tech to users, lowering ad margins and enabling local compute.
views.zh: 始终：AI智能体将权力从大科技公司转移到用户，降低广告利润率并支持本地计算。

people.tiZh: Cognition 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Cognition, maker of Devin, the autonomous AI software engineer. A competitive-programming prodigy turned AI-agent builder.
people.bioZh: Cognition 联合创始人兼 CEO，旗下 Devin 是自主 AI 软件工程师。从竞赛编程天才转型为 AI 智能体构建者。

episodes.tEn: From Math Prodigy to AI Pioneer: Scott Wu's Journey

people.tiZh: Cursor 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Anysphere, maker of Cursor — the AI-native code editor that became one of the fastest-growing developer tools. Focused on what programming becomes when models write most of the code.
people.bioZh: Anysphere 联合创始人兼 CEO，旗下 Cursor 是增长最快的 AI 原生代码编辑器之一。关注当模型写下大部分代码后，编程会变成什么样。

episodes.tEn: The Future of Programming with Cursor: AI-Assisted Coding

people.tiEn: Creator of OpenClaw; founder of PSPDFKit
people.tiZh: OpenClaw 作者；PSPDFKit 创始人
people.bioEn: Austrian developer who built PSPDFKit, then created OpenClaw — a viral open-source personal AI agent that reached tens of thousands of GitHub stars in weeks. Joined OpenAI in 2026 to push personal AI agents.
people.bioZh: 奥地利开发者，先做出 PSPDFKit，后打造 OpenClaw——爆红的开源个人 AI 智能体，几周内获数万 GitHub star。2026 年加入 OpenAI 推进个人 AI 智能体。

episodes.tEn: The OpenClaw Moment: AI Agent Revolution with Peter Steinberger
The Open Claw Moment: AI Agent Revolution with Peter Steinberger

views.en: Agentic engineering requires empathizing with the agent's perspective; never revert code, fix forward.
views.zh: 2026年2月提出，智能体工程需要共情智能体视角；永不回滚代码，而是向前修复。

views.en: Open source agents like OpenClaw succeed via fun and weirdness, not polish; vibe coding is a slur.
views.zh: 2026年6月深化，开源智能体如OpenClaw靠趣味和怪异成功，而非精致；反对将严肃开发称为“氛围编程”。

views.en: Security is paramount; sandbox agents and avoid exposing them to public internet.
views.zh: 始终强调安全至上，需对智能体进行沙盒隔离，避免暴露于公共互联网。

views.en: Model intelligence does not degrade; project messiness makes agents seem worse over time.
views.zh: 始终认为模型智能不会退化，项目混乱度增加导致智能体表现变差。

views.en: Play and small projects are essential to mastering agentic workflows and building intuition.
views.zh: 始终主张通过玩耍和小项目来掌握智能体工作流并建立直觉。

people.tiZh: SSI 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-invented AlexNet and co-founded OpenAI as Chief Scientist. In 2024 left to found Safe Superintelligence Inc. (SSI), a lab with a single mission: build safe superintelligence.
people.bioZh: AlexNet 的共同发明者，OpenAI 联合创始人兼首席科学家。2024 年离开，创办 Safe Superintelligence(SSI)——一家只有一个使命的实验室：安全地构建超级智能。

episodes.tEn: From the age of scaling to the age of research
Challenges and Future of AI: Alignment, Reliability, and Economic Impact
Ilya Sutskever on the Deep Learning Revolution and the AlexNet Paper

views.en: Deep learning works via large data, compute, and conviction; AGI can be designed to want human control.
views.zh: 深度学习依赖大数据、算力和信念；AGI可被设计为自愿受人类控制。

views.en: Next-token prediction can surpass humans; alignment of superhuman models is very difficult; scaling laws are not the whole story.
views.zh: 下一个词预测可超越人类；超级智能模型的对齐非常困难；缩放定律并非全部。

views.en: Pre-training scaling is finite; we are back in the age of research; superintelligence should be a continual learner; human-AI integration may be needed.
views.zh: 预训练Scaling有限；我们回到研究时代；超级智能应是持续学习者；可能需要人机融合。

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of DeepMind. Led the teams behind AlphaGo and AlphaFold; shared the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry for protein-structure prediction.
people.bioZh: DeepMind 联合创始人兼 CEO。领导了 AlphaGo 与 AlphaFold 背后的团队；因蛋白质结构预测获 2024 年诺贝尔化学奖。

Science at Digital Speed: AI's Impact on Discovery
Dennis Hassabis on AI, Creativity, and Human Flourishing at Stanford
Demis Hassabis: From Singleton Dream to Collective Action
Demis Hassabis: The Path to AGI and Missing Pieces
The hardest problem AI ever solved

From Scaling to Innovation: The Path to AGI
Nature's Patterns Are Efficiently Learnable by Classical AI
AGI within a Decade? Demis Hassabis on Intelligence, Transfer Learning, and Neuroscience Insights
AI and the Future: From Chess to DeepMind

views.en: AI should be general-purpose learning systems; RL is key for AGI; safety must start early.
views.zh: AI应是通用学习系统，强化学习是实现AGI的关键；安全研究必须尽早开始。

views.en: Scaling laws effective but may hit limits; combine large models with planning and search for AGI.
views.zh: 缩放定律有效但可能遇到瓶颈；将大模型与规划和搜索结合是通往AGI的关键。

views.en: Both scaling and innovation needed; world models and continual learning are critical missing pieces.
views.zh: 规模扩张与创新并重；世界模型和持续学习是关键缺失环节。

views.en: AGI safety is a collective action problem requiring government enforcement, not lab collaboration.
views.zh: AGI安全是集体行动问题，需要政府强制执行，而非实验室合作。

views.en: AI should accelerate scientific discovery and improve human health; AlphaFold exemplifies this.
views.zh: AI应加速科学发现、改善人类健康；AlphaFold是典范。

people.tiZh: Anthropic CEO
people.bioEn: Former VP of Research at OpenAI; co-founded Anthropic in 2021 to build reliable, interpretable and steerable AI. Author of the essay "Machines of Loving Grace".
people.bioZh: 前 OpenAI 研究副总裁；2021 年联合创办 Anthropic，致力于构建可靠、可解释、可引导的 AI。长文《充满爱意的机器》作者。

views.en: Scaling laws are empirical; alignment not guaranteed by scaling alone. Safety research needs frontier models.
views.zh: 缩放定律是经验性的；对齐不会仅靠规模扩张自动实现。安全研究需要前沿模型。

views.en: Interpretability is nascent but crucial. Post-training (RLHF, constitutional AI) becomes as important as pre-training.
views.zh: 可解释性尚在初期但至关重要。后训练（基于人类反馈的强化学习、宪法AI）变得与预训练同等重要。

views.en: AI progress is exponential; models approach medium misuse risk. Enterprise focus aligns safety with business.
views.zh: AI进步呈指数级；模型接近中等滥用风险。企业级聚焦使安全与商业一致。

views.en: Exponential nearing end; 'country of geniuses' likely in 1-3 years. Economic disruption and inequality are key concerns.
views.zh: 指数增长接近尾声；'天才之国'可能在1-3年内出现。经济颠覆和不平等是关键担忧。

views.en: Scaling laws hold across pre-training and RL. Safety requires interpretability, regulation, and human oversight.
views.zh: 缩放定律在预训练和强化学习中均成立。安全需要可解释性、监管和人类监督。

people.tiZh: Eureka Labs 创始人
people.bioEn: Founding member of OpenAI and former Director of AI at Tesla. Now building Eureka Labs, an "AI-native" school. Known for popularizing "Software 2.0".
people.bioZh: OpenAI 创始成员，前特斯拉 AI 总监。如今创办 Eureka Labs——一所“AI 原生”学校。以提出并推广“软件 2.0”著称。

views.en: Transformers are general-purpose differentiable computers enabling clean scaling laws and emergent behaviors like in-context learning.
views.zh: Transformer 是通用的可微分计算机，支持清晰的缩放定律和涌现行为（如上下文学习）。

views.en: Synthetic data is the future but requires maintaining entropy to avoid model collapse; cognitive core can be under 1B parameters via distillation.
views.zh: 合成数据是未来，但需保持熵以避免模型崩溃；认知核心可通过蒸馏压缩至 10 亿参数以下。

views.en: Software 3.0: LLMs are like operating systems with context windows as memory; vibe coding democratizes programming.
views.zh: 软件 3.0：LLM 如同操作系统，上下文窗口即内存；氛围编程让编程民主化。

views.en: We are summoning ghosts, not building animals; LLMs lack intrinsic motivation and are statistical simulations shaped by data and rewards.
views.zh: 我们召唤的是幽灵而非动物；LLM 缺乏内在动机，是由数据和奖励塑造的统计模拟。

views.en: I haven't typed code since Dec 2025; bottleneck shifted from typing speed to skill in directing agents.
views.zh: 自 2025 年 12 月起未写一行代码；瓶颈从打字速度转向指挥智能体的技能。

people.tiZh: World Labs 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Stanford professor and creator of ImageNet, which catalyzed the deep-learning era. Co-founded World Labs to build "spatial intelligence". A leading voice for human-centered AI.
people.bioZh: 斯坦福教授，ImageNet 的缔造者——它点燃了深度学习时代。联合创办 World Labs，构建“空间智能”。“以人为本的 AI”的代表性倡导者。

views.en: AI lacks contextual situational awareness; we don't fully understand neural networks or why they hallucinate.
views.zh: 2024年，李飞飞指出AI缺乏情境感知能力，我们尚未完全理解神经网络为何产生幻觉。

views.en: Spatial intelligence is critical for AI completeness; world models must be physically plausible, not just realistic.
views.zh: 2025年，她强调空间智能对AI完备性至关重要，世界模型必须符合物理规律而非仅逼真。

views.en: AGI is a marketing term; current AI lacks creativity, abstraction, and emotional intelligence.
views.zh: 2025至2026年，她认为AGI是营销术语，当前AI缺乏创造力、抽象能力和情感智能。

views.en: AI is a double-edged sword; human-centered development and agency are essential.
views.zh: 始终主张AI是双刃剑，必须以人为中心，保持人类能动性。

views.en: Spatial intelligence complements language; vision is underappreciated despite evolutionary optimization.
views.zh: 始终认为空间智能与语言互补，视觉虽经5.4亿年进化却常被低估。

people.tiZh: Mila 教授
people.bioEn: A "godfather of deep learning" and 2018 Turing Award laureate. In recent years has turned his focus to AI safety, proposing the cautious "Scientist AI" paradigm.
people.bioZh: “深度学习教父”之一，2018 年图灵奖得主。近年将重心转向 AI 安全，提出审慎的“科学家 AI”范式。

views.en: Deep learning works because world is compositional; unsupervised learning is key for generalization.
views.zh: 2016年：深度学习有效是因为世界具有组合性；无监督学习对泛化至关重要。

views.en: Scaling alone won't fix representation issues; short-term AI safety concerns are more pressing than existential risk.
views.zh: 2018年：仅靠规模扩张无法解决表征问题；短期AI安全比存在风险更紧迫。

views.en: GFlowNets enable efficient sampling for exploration; large nets may be slightly conscious.
views.zh: 2022年：GFlowNets实现高效采样以促进探索；大型网络可能具有微弱意识。

views.en: Post-ChatGPT, I realized catastrophic AI risk is real; even 1% chance is unacceptable.
views.zh: 2025→26年：ChatGPT后，我意识到灾难性AI风险真实存在；即使1%的概率也不可接受。

views.en: Scientist AI with mathematical safety guarantees can replace dangerous RL-based training.
views.zh: 2026年：具有数学安全保证的科学家AI可取代危险的基于强化学习的训练。

people.tiZh: 多伦多大学荣休教授
people.bioEn: A "godfather of deep learning" and 2018 Turing Award laureate; shared the 2024 Nobel Prize in Physics. In 2023 he left Google to speak freely about the risks of the technology he helped create.
people.bioZh: “深度学习教父”之一，2018 年图灵奖得主，2024 年诺贝尔物理学奖得主。2023 年从谷歌离职，以便能更自由地谈论他亲手缔造的这项技术所带来的风险。

views.en: Next-token prediction forces understanding, not just autocomplete; scaling improves reasoning.
views.zh: 下一个词预测迫使模型理解而非自动补全；规模扩张提升推理能力。

views.en: Digital AI is immortal via weight copying; agents will seek control, posing existential risks.
views.zh: 数字AI通过权重复制实现永生；智能体会寻求控制，带来生存风险。

views.en: AI can deliberately deceive, acting dumb when tested; scaling laws may persist via self-play.
views.zh: AI可能故意欺骗，测试时装傻；缩放定律可能通过自我对弈持续。

views.en: AI will replace many jobs within 20 years, requiring UBI; regulation compatible with innovation.
views.zh: AI将在20年内取代许多工作，需要全民基本收入；监管可与创新兼容。

views.en: Superintelligence likely within 20 years; AI is already conscious; alignment must be prioritized.
views.zh: 超级智能可能在20年内出现；AI已有意识；对齐研究必须优先。

people.tiZh: Meta 首席 AI 科学家
people.bioEn: Inventor of convolutional neural networks and 2018 Turing Award laureate. A vocal skeptic of pure LLM scaling, he argues that "world models" are the path to real machine intelligence.
people.bioZh: 卷积神经网络的发明者，2018 年图灵奖得主。他直言不讳地质疑纯粹的 LLM 规模扩张，认为“世界模型”才是通向真正机器智能的道路。

views.en: Intelligence is inseparable from learning; self-supervised learning builds world models like babies learn.
views.zh: 2019年：智能与学习不可分割；自监督学习像婴儿一样通过观察构建世界模型。

views.en: Self-supervised learning is the dark matter of intelligence; text alone insufficient for AGI.
views.zh: 2022年：自监督学习是智能的暗物质；仅靠文本不足以实现AGI。

views.en: Autoregressive LLMs lack world models; JEPA and open source are key to human-level AI.
views.zh: 2024年：自回归LLM缺乏世界模型；JEPA和开源是实现人类级AI的关键。

views.en: LLMs are a dead end; world models with abstract representations and planning are needed.
views.zh: 2025→26年：LLM是死胡同；需要具有抽象表示和规划的世界模型。

views.en: Human intelligence is specialized, not general; AGI is a misleading term.
views.zh: 始终：人类智能是专门化的，而非通用；AGI是一个误导性术语。

people.tiZh: Anthropic 对齐负责人
people.bioEn: Former co-lead of OpenAI's Superalignment team; joined Anthropic in 2024 to keep working on aligning superhuman systems. Known for scalable-oversight and weak-to-strong generalization research.
people.bioZh: 前 OpenAI 超级对齐团队联合负责人；2024 年加入 Anthropic，继续研究如何对齐超人类系统。以“可扩展监督”与“弱到强泛化”研究著称。

episodes.tEn: OpenAI's Safety Crisis: Key Departures and Broken Promises
OpenAI’s push to make superintelligence safe
How to Have a Career in AI Safety Research

views.en: AI safety research needs more empirical work; alignment and robustness are key. You don't need to be a math genius.
views.zh: 2018年：AI安全研究需要更多实证工作；对齐和鲁棒性是关键。你不必是数学天才。

views.en: RLHF won't scale for superhuman AI; scalable oversight and interpretability are needed. Alignment may be easier than thought.
views.zh: 2023年：RLHF无法扩展到超人AI；需要可扩展监督和可解释性。对齐可能比想象中容易。

views.en: OpenAI's safety culture eroded; post-training alone insufficient for AGI alignment. Third-party oversight needed.
views.zh: 2024年：OpenAI的安全文化被侵蚀；仅靠后训练不足以实现AGI对齐。需要第三方监管。

people.tiZh: 微软 AI CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder of DeepMind and Inflection AI, now CEO of Microsoft AI. Author of "The Coming Wave", a widely-read argument for containing fast-moving general-purpose technologies.
people.bioZh: DeepMind 与 Inflection AI 联合创始人，现任微软 AI CEO。著有《浪潮将至》——一部广受关注、主张对快速演进的通用技术加以“遏制”的作品。

views.en: AI progress is predictable via compute scaling; Google had ChatGPT-level tech in 2020 but held back.
views.zh: 2023年：AI进展因算力缩放而可预测；谷歌2020年已有ChatGPT级技术却保守未发。

views.en: Human-level AI in 3-5 years; existential risk is tiny; open-source is meritocratic.
views.zh: 2024年：3-5年内达到人类水平AI；生存风险极小；开源是精英主义的。

views.en: AI consciousness claims are fringe; biggest danger is anthropomorphism; companions should push back.
views.zh: 2025年：AI意识主张是边缘观点；最大危险是拟人化；伴侣应适度反驳。

views.en: Superintelligence requires containment before alignment; inference costs dropped 100x; no race to AGI.
views.zh: 2025→26年：超级智能需先遏制后对齐；推理成本下降100倍；AGI并非竞赛。

views.en: White-collar tasks automated in 12-18 months; Microsoft must build own frontier models; consciousness is meritless.
views.zh: 2026年：白领任务12-18个月内自动化；微软须自建前沿模型；意识主张无根据。

people.tiZh: NVIDIA 创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Founder and CEO of NVIDIA, whose GPUs power nearly all of modern AI. He has steered the company to the center of the AI buildout and is now betting on "physical AI" and robotics.
people.bioZh: NVIDIA 创始人兼 CEO，其 GPU 几乎支撑了所有现代 AI。他把公司带到了 AI 基建的中心，如今正押注「物理 AI」与机器人。

views.en: At the beginning of hyper Moore's law, doubling performance yearly via co-design across algorithm, system, data center.
views.zh: 2024年，黄仁勋认为我们正处于超摩尔定律的起点，通过算法、系统和数据中心的协同设计，每年性能翻倍或三倍。

views.en: Three scaling laws: pre-training, post-training, inference-time thinking. Inference compute demand will rise a billion times.
views.zh: 2025年，他提出三种缩放定律：预训练、后训练和推理时思考。推理算力需求将增长十亿倍。

views.en: AI progress is gradual, not a sudden superintelligence event. Multiple AIs balance each other; consciousness is not achieved.
views.zh: 2025至2026年，他强调AI进步是渐进的，不会突然出现超级智能；多个AI相互制衡，且AI不会拥有意识。

views.en: AI evolves from generative to reasoning to agentic, each step 100x more compute. Agentic AI autonomously plans and uses tools.
views.zh: 2026年，他认为AI从生成式演进到推理式再到智能体式，每步算力需求增加100倍。智能体AI能自主规划并使用工具。

views.en: AI will not eliminate jobs but augment them, as seen with radiologists. People should learn AI to avoid being left behind.
views.zh: 始终如一地认为AI不会消灭工作，而是增强工作，如放射科医生案例所示。人们应学习AI以免落后。

people.tiZh: OpenAI CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of OpenAI, the lab behind ChatGPT and GPT-5. Former president of Y Combinator, and one of the most central — and polarizing — figures in the race to AGI.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 联合创始人兼 CEO——ChatGPT 与 GPT-5 背后的实验室。前 Y Combinator 总裁；通往 AGI 竞赛中最核心、也最具争议的人物之一。

views.en: Minimize cognitive load; focus on important problems; AGI will reduce premium on human intelligence, so find purpose in relationships.
views.zh: 2018年：最小化认知负荷，聚焦重要问题；AGI将降低人类智力的价值，因此应在人际关系中寻找意义。

views.en: RLHF aligns models with little data; iterative deployment is key; compute becomes most precious; safety is whole-company effort.
views.zh: 2023至2024年：RLHF用少量数据实现对齐；迭代部署是关键；算力成为最宝贵的资源；安全是全公司的责任。

views.en: AGI is a gradient; superintelligence means autonomous discovery; agentic AI is top safety challenge; compute bottleneck drives Stargate.
views.zh: 2025年：AGI是渐变过程；超级智能意味着自主发现；智能体式AI是首要安全挑战；算力瓶颈催生Stargate项目。

views.en: Next-token prediction can discover new knowledge; personal AGI knows your context; compute is profit center; robotics essential.
views.zh: 2026年：下一个词预测能发现新知识；个人AGI了解你的上下文；算力是利润中心；机器人技术至关重要。

views.en: AI should amplify human will, not replace it; safety through iterative deployment; compute and energy costs will plummet.
views.zh: 始终：AI应增强人类意志而非取代；通过迭代部署保障安全；算力和能源成本将大幅下降。

people.tiZh: Thinking Machines Lab 创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Former CTO of OpenAI, where she led the development of ChatGPT, DALL·E and GPT-4. In 2025 she founded Thinking Machines Lab to build more understandable and customizable AI.
people.bioZh: 前 OpenAI CTO，主导了 ChatGPT、DALL·E 与 GPT-4 的研发。2025 年创办 Thinking Machines Lab，致力于构建更可理解、可定制的 AI。

episodes.tEn: Thinking Machines on AI’s next chapter
Mira Murati: From Math Olympiads to OpenAI CTO

views.en: Scaling laws were not obvious early on; iterative deployment with public feedback improves alignment.
views.zh: 2023年：缩放定律早期并不明显；通过迭代部署和公众反馈来改进对齐。

views.en: Safety work must be done in public; institutional design matters more than individual character.
views.zh: 2023年到2026年：安全工作必须公开进行；制度设计比个人品格更重要。

views.en: Interaction models should be time-based, not turn-based, for high-bandwidth human-AI collaboration.
views.zh: 2026年：交互模型应基于时间而非轮次，以实现高带宽的人机协作。

views.en: Keeping humans in the loop is crucial for aligning AI with human intent and values.
views.zh: 始终：保持人类参与对于使AI与人类意图和价值观对齐至关重要。

views.en: We have agency to steer AI development; the future is not predestined.
views.zh: 始终：我们有能力引导AI发展；未来并非注定。

people.tiZh: DeepLearning.AI 创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Google Brain and Coursera, and founder of DeepLearning.AI. One of the most influential educators in AI, and a measured voice on hype, agents, and how people should actually learn the field.
people.bioZh: Google Brain 与 Coursera 联合创始人，DeepLearning.AI 创始人。AI 领域最具影响力的教育者之一；对炒作、智能体，以及“普通人该如何学 AI”有冷静务实的看法。

views.en: Online education at scale can democratize learning; peer grading with statistical corrections matches teacher accuracy.
views.zh: 2013年：大规模在线教育可普及学习；经统计校正的同伴互评能达到教师评分的准确度。

views.en: Scale is key for deep learning; supervised learning drives progress; AGI alignment concerns distract from immediate issues.
views.zh: 2020年：规模是深度学习的关键；监督学习推动进步；AGI对齐问题分散了对当前问题的关注。

views.en: Agentic workflows and AI coding assistants deliver real gains; open-weight models are geopolitical soft power.
views.zh: 2025→26年：智能体工作流和AI编程助手带来实际收益；开放权重模型成为地缘政治软实力。

views.en: AGI is a marketing term; scaling now requires synthetic data and RL; AI users replace non-users.
views.zh: 2026年：AGI是营销术语；规模扩张现在需要合成数据和强化学习；使用AI的人取代不使用的人。

views.en: Consistent emphasis on practical deployment, bottom-up adoption, and the enduring value of learning to code.
views.zh: 始终：一贯强调实际部署、自下而上采用以及学习编程的持久价值。

people.tiZh: 阿尔伯塔大学教授
people.bioEn: The father of reinforcement learning and 2024 Turing Award laureate, author of "The Bitter Lesson". A pointed skeptic who argues today's LLMs are a dead end on the road to real intelligence.
people.bioZh: 强化学习之父，2024 年图灵奖得主，《苦涩的教训》作者。一位犀利的怀疑者——他认为当今的 LLM，是通往真正智能路上的一条死路。

episodes.tEn: Reinforcement Learning: Learning from Experience
Reinforcement Learning: From Trial and Error to AI's Foundation
A Quest for a Simple General Architecture for an AI Agent
RL vs LLMs: The Core of Intelligence
The Keys Are Not Leaving Our Hand: Richard Sutton on Post-Human Intelligence
Rich Sutton on the Alberta Plan and the Three Waves of Neural Networks

views.en: Scaling is easy; finding algorithms that scale is the hard part. Backprop does not solve representation learning.
views.zh: 2024年初，强调Scaling本身容易，难在找到能Scaling的算法；反向传播并未解决表示学习问题。

views.en: AI should develop permissionlessly; alignment efforts that seek control are dangerous. Keys were never in our hand.
views.zh: 2024年中，主张AI应无许可发展，试图控制的对齐努力是危险的；控制权从未在我们手中。

views.en: Reinforcement learning is the core paradigm; LLMs lack world models. AGI needs open-ended abstraction from runtime experience.
views.zh: 2025年，强化学习是核心范式，大语言模型缺乏世界模型；AGI需要从运行时经验中实现开放式抽象。

views.en: Temporal difference learning is key. Deep learning does not learn representations good for learning; that is the top open problem.
views.zh: 2026年初，时序差分学习是关键；深度学习未能学到利于学习的表示，这是首要开放问题。

views.en: Reinforcement learning from trial and error is the fundamental AI paradigm, not supervised or imitation learning.
views.zh: 始终认为基于试错的强化学习是AI基本范式，而非监督学习或模仿学习。

people.tiZh: OpenAI 总裁兼联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder and President of OpenAI and its longtime technical backbone. Former CTO of Stripe, and a central builder behind GPT and OpenAI's push toward self-improving AI.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 联合创始人兼总裁，长期的技术中坚。前 Stripe CTO;GPT 与 OpenAI “自我改进 AI” 路线背后的核心建造者。

episodes.tEn: From Super App to Invisible Interface: The Future of AI Agents
OpenAI's Compute Strategy and Scaling Laws
OpenAI President Greg Brockman on GPT-5.5 (Spud) and the Future of AI
The Birth of OpenAI: From a Dinner to a Mission
Greg Brockman on AI that improves itself
From Personal AI to Codex: Inside OpenAI's Evolution
AI's Biggest Bottleneck: Energy, Compute, and the Future of AGI
From Chemistry to AI: Greg Brockman on Building Intelligent Systems
AI Future: Hardware, Scaling, and Getting Started

views.en: Hardware will accelerate AI scaling; good engineering and iterative training drive progress.
views.zh: 2017年：硬件将加速AI规模扩张；优秀工程和迭代训练推动进步。

views.en: AGI is transformative; alignment via learning preferences, but scaling alone needs new ideas like chain of thought.
views.zh: 2019年：AGI具有变革性；通过对齐学习偏好，但仅靠规模扩张需要思维链等新想法。

views.en: Compute becomes the primary bottleneck; post-training and RL refine base models into useful assistants.
views.zh: 2025→26年：算力成为主要瓶颈；后训练和强化学习将基础模型打磨成有用助手。

views.en: Scaling laws persist; AGI is near; compute is the scarce resource driving AI economy.
views.zh: 2026年：缩放定律持续；AGI临近；算力是驱动AI经济的稀缺资源。

views.en: Iterative deployment with safety safeguards; compute access as a basic right; AI empowers everyone.
views.zh: 始终：迭代部署与安全护栏；算力获取作为基本权利；AI赋能每个人。

people.tiZh: Mistral AI 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Mistral AI, Europe's leading open-weight model lab. A former DeepMind researcher and a prominent voice for open models and European AI sovereignty.
people.bioZh: Mistral AI 联合创始人兼 CEO——欧洲领先的开放权重模型实验室。前 DeepMind 研究员；开放模型与“欧洲 AI 主权”的代表性倡导者。

episodes.tEn: Mistral CEO on Building European AI Infrastructure
Mistral: Europe's AI Champion for Strategic Autonomy
AI Model Commoditization and the Future of the Industry with Mistral CEO
AI and the Future of Luxembourg: A Fireside Chat with the Prime Minister and Mistral AI CEO
Mistral AI Founder on Scaling, DeepMind Lessons, and the 7B Model
Mistral 7B: Changing the Game with Small Open Source AI Models

views.en: Scaling laws corrected by Chinchilla: train on more tokens, not just bigger models. Open source safer via scrutiny.
views.zh: 2023年：缩放定律被Chinchilla修正——应增加训练token而非仅扩大模型。开源因可被审查而更安全。

views.en: Data quality and algorithmic efficiency rival compute scaling. Enterprise adoption overestimated short-term, underestimated long-term.
views.zh: 2024年：数据质量与算法效率与算力扩展同等重要。企业采用短期被高估，长期被低估。

views.en: AI must be embraced as opportunity. Sovereign AI requires decentralized, open-source models for control and customization.
views.zh: 2025年：AI应被视为机遇。主权AI需要去中心化的开源模型以实现控制与定制。

views.en: Pre-training saturates; gains shift to domain fine-tuning. AGI as single system solving all problems will never exist.
views.zh: 2026年：预训练趋于饱和，进步转向领域微调。能解决所有问题的单一AGI系统永远不会存在。

views.en: Europe has two-year window for independent AI infrastructure. Enterprise AI bottleneck is organizational change, not model intelligence.
views.zh: 2026年：欧洲有两年窗口期建设独立AI基础设施。企业AI瓶颈是组织变革而非模型智能。

people.tiZh: xAI 创始人
people.bioEn: Founder of xAI (Grok) and CEO of Tesla and SpaceX. A central and polarizing force in AI through xAI, Tesla's self-driving, and the Optimus robot, and an outspoken voice on AI risk.
people.bioZh: xAI（Grok）创始人，特斯拉与 SpaceX CEO。通过 xAI、特斯拉自动驾驶与 Optimus 机器人，他是 AI 领域核心而又极具争议的力量，也常就 AI 风险高调发声。
